name: Roast Cod with Persillade Crust
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Cod Fillet of uniform thickness
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the cod into four pieces and season with salt and pepper.
2. Mix chopped garlic with parsley.
3. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C) or gas mark 6.
4. Dust the fish in plain flour, dip in egg, and coat with the parsley and garlic mixture.
5. Dribble a little olive oil over the fish on both sides.
6. Place the fish in a roasting tin, oiled side down.
7. Dribble a little oil on the top side and roast for 10 minutes or until cooked.
8. Turn off the oven and leave the door slightly ajar. Transfer the fish to a warm plate, leaving it on the edge of the oven.
9. Place the roasting tin over moderate heat and toss the spinach lightly in it. Allow to wilt slightly and divide onto four plates. Put the fish on top, scatter olive around, and serve with lemon quarters.
